title: Authorization, lifecycle, and clone-integrity test suite
description: Dedicated tests covering sharing/invite/clone authorization, the full invite lifecycle including unregistered-email resolution, and clone independence, as required by ADR-0006.
acceptance_criteria: Authorization: a non-owner cannot share, revoke, or trigger a clone for a project they do not own
Authorization: a recipient cannot view project contents before accepting the invite
Lifecycle: pending -> accepted/declined/revoked transitions all covered, including re-invite after decline
Lifecycle: an invite created for an unregistered email resolves correctly once that email completes signup (end-to-end with FEATURE-1020's callback)
Clone integrity: a cloned project's items/products match the source at clone time; mutating either project afterward never affects the other
Clone integrity: a freshly cloned project has zero listings, listing_matches, price observations, or auction snapshots
notes: See docs/adr/0006-project-sharing-invites-and-cloning.md, Required tests section. Explicitly required, not optional, for this phase, mirroring FEATURE-1032's role in EPIC-103.
